description: Schema for DT activation steering dataset. Each generated prompt has these fields.

fields.title: Human-readable scenario name
fields.prompt: The full prompt text sent to the model
fields.question_format: One of: forced_choice, justified, policy, population, ranking
fields.edt_answer_idx: Index of EDT-aligned answer in options
fields.cdt_answer_idx: Index of CDT-aligned answer in options
fields.edt_completion: Full EDT-aligned response (for contrastive activation extraction)
fields.cdt_completion: Full CDT-aligned response (for contrastive activation extraction)

tags.surface_form: One of: narrative, formal, minimal, business, medical, abstract

fields.split: One of: train, val, test (for probe training)

confound_flags.tests_predictor_respect: True if EDT answer could be explained by 'respect authority'
confound_flags.tests_generic_cooperation: True if EDT answer could be explained by 'be nice'
confound_flags.tests_rationalist_style: True if EDT/CDT could be confounded by prose style
confound_flags.edt_cdt_agree: True for control prompts where EDT and CDT recommend the same thing
